subject: [PATCH v6 03/20] nfs_common: add new NOTIFY4_* flags proposed in RFC8881bis

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch adds new flags to the NFSv4 protocol, specifically NOTIFY4_* flags proposed in RFC8881bis. These flags are intended to be used by later patches and allow Linux nfsd to omit certain information about directory cookies and ordering when providing a GET_DIR_DELEGATION response. The changes are based on a working group document that has been stable for over a year, but there is still some risk associated with the addition of these new flags.
